# KernelModule Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-kernelmodule
kind: KernelModule
spec:
    name: example
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: KernelModule
spec:
  name: br_netfilter
  load: true
  persist: true
  persistFile: /etc/modules-load.d/k8s.conf
```
